mapper.select: /* 最近12个月（含当月），月份无数据补0；MySQL 5 兼容 */ SELECT DATE_FORMAT(m.m_date, '%Y-%m') AS ym, COALESCE(a.published_cnt, 0) AS published_cnt, COALESCE(a.draft_cnt, 0) AS draft_cnt FROM ( /* 生成从当月起向前共12个月的每月第一天 */ SELECT DATE_SUB(STR_TO_DATE(DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE(), '%Y-%m-01'), '%Y-%m-%d'), INTERVAL n MONTH) AS m_date FROM ( SELECT 0 AS n UNION ALL SELECT 1 UNION ALL SELECT 2 UNION ALL SELECT 3 UNION ALL SELECT 4 UNION ALL SELECT 5 UNION ALL SELECT 6 UNION ALL SELECT 7 UNION ALL SELECT 8 UNION ALL SELECT 9 UNION ALL SELECT 10 UNION ALL SELECT 11 ) AS nums ) AS m LEFT JOIN ( /* 聚合文章为每月第一天，限制在最近12个月窗口内 */ SELECT STR_TO_DATE(DATE_FORMAT(create_time, '%Y-%m-01'), '%Y-%m-%d') AS m_date, SUM(CASE WHEN COALESCE(publish_state, 0) = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS published_cnt, SUM(CASE WHEN COALESCE(publish_state, 0) = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS draft_cnt FROM article WHERE create_time >= DATE_SUB(DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE(), '%Y-%m-01'), INTERVAL 11 MONTH) AND create_time < DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE(), '%Y-%m-01'), INTERVAL 1 MONTH) GROUP BY m_date ) AS a ON a.m_date = m.m_date ORDER BY m.m_date;

-- 单行返回：文章总数(3)、已发布(2)、草稿(1) SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_count, SUM(CASE WHEN publish_state = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS published_count, SUM(CASE WHEN publish_state = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS draft_count FROM article;
